message:
feat(shared): update API schemas and improve client SDK generation

## Agent Command Schema Updates
- commands/agent.ts: Add 'acp' and 'tmux' to driver enum options
- commands/agent.ts: Change state enums from lifecycle states (spawning,
  ready, executing, etc.) to activity states (idle, thinking, working,
  tool_calling, waiting_input, error, stalled) to match driver behavior
- commands/agent.ts: Update output types from stdout/stderr to semantic
  types (text, markdown, thinking, tool_use, tool_result, error, system)

## Client SDK Generation Improvements
- codegen/client.ts: Handle HTTP 204 No Content responses gracefully
- codegen/client.ts: Handle non-JSON responses (return as text)
- codegen/client.ts: URL-encode path parameters with encodeURIComponent()
- codegen/client.ts: Fix query string building to filter null/undefined
- codegen/client.ts: Add error handling for streaming responses
- codegen/client.ts: Fix streaming buffer handling for partial SSE lines
  (properly accumulate partial data across chunks)

## REST Handler Generation
- codegen/rest.ts: Change validation error code INVALID_INPUT -> INVALID_REQUEST
- codegen/rest.ts: Change error property 'field' -> 'path' for consistency

## Error Codes
- errors/codes.ts: Add AGENT_ERROR_STATE (409) for agents in error state

## New Agent State Module
- agent/state.ts: Add shared agent state types and utilities
- index.ts: Export new agent module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,8 +103,8 @@ function generateHandlerCode(cmd: RegisteredCommand): string {
     `    const validation = commands.get('${name}')!.inputSchema.safeParse(input);`,
     "    if (!validation.success) {",
     "      return c.json(serializeGatewayError(",
-    "        createValidationError('INVALID_INPUT', validation.error.errors.map(e => ({",
-    "          field: e.path.join('.'),",
+    "        createValidationError('INVALID_REQUEST', validation.error.errors.map(e => ({",
+    "          path: e.path.join('.'),",
     "          message: e.message,",
     "          code: e.code,",
     "        })))",

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ const SpawnConfigSchema = z.object({
   /** Maximum tokens for the agent session */
   maxTokens: z.number().min(1000).max(1000000).optional(),
   /** Agent driver type */
-  driver: z.enum(["sdk", "docker", "mock"]).optional(),
+  driver: z.enum(["sdk", "acp", "tmux", "mock"]).optional(),
   /** PTY configuration */
   pty: z
     .object({
@@ -43,7 +43,15 @@ const SpawnedAgentSchema = z.object({
 /** Schema for agent summary in list */
 const AgentSummarySchema = z.object({
   agentId: z.string(),
-  state: z.enum(["spawning", "ready", "executing", "paused", "terminating", "terminated"]),
+  state: z.enum([
+    "idle",
+    "thinking",
+    "working",
+    "tool_calling",
+    "waiting_input",
+    "error",
+    "stalled",
+  ]),
   driver: z.string(),
   createdAt: z.string().datetime(),
   lastActivityAt: z.string().datetime(),
@@ -65,7 +73,15 @@ const ListAgentsResponseSchema = z.object({
 /** Schema for agent detail response */
 const AgentDetailSchema = z.object({
   agentId: z.string(),
-  state: z.enum(["spawning", "ready", "executing", "paused", "terminating", "terminated"]),
+  state: z.enum([
+    "idle",
+    "thinking",
+    "working",
+    "tool_calling",
+    "waiting_input",
+    "error",
+    "stalled",
+  ]),
   driver: z.string(),
   createdAt: z.string().datetime(),
   lastActivityAt: z.string().datetime(),
@@ -249,15 +265,17 @@ export const getOutput = defineCommand({
     agentId: z.string(),
     cursor: z.string().optional(),
     limit: z.number().min(1).max(1000).default(100),
-    types: z.array(z.enum(["stdout", "stderr", "system", "tool_use", "tool_result"])).optional(),
+    types: z
+      .array(z.enum(["text", "markdown", "thinking", "tool_use", "tool_result", "error", "system"]))
+      .optional(),
     wait: z.number().min(0).max(30000).optional(),
   }),
   output: z.object({
     chunks: z.array(
       z.object({
         cursor: z.string(),
         timestamp: z.string().datetime(),
-        type: z.enum(["stdout", "stderr", "system", "tool_use", "tool_result"]),
+        type: z.enum(["text", "markdown", "thinking", "tool_use", "tool_result", "error", "system"]),
         content: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.string(), z.unknown())]),
       }),
     ),
@@ -298,7 +316,15 @@ export const interruptAgent = defineCommand({
     agentId: z.string(),
     signal: z.string(),
     sentAt: z.string().datetime(),
-    previousState: z.enum(["spawning", "ready", "executing", "paused", "terminating", "terminated"]),
+    previousState: z.enum([
+      "idle",
+      "thinking",
+      "working",
+      "tool_calling",
+      "waiting_input",
+      "error",
+      "stalled",
+    ]),
   }),
   rest: { method: "POST", path: "/agents/:agentId/interrupt" },
   ws: { emitsEvents: ["agent:interrupted"] },
